topdown_view.config.title: Top-Down View Settings
topdown_view.config.default_enabled.tool: Automatically enable top-down view when the game starts.
topdown_view.config.arrival_threshold.to:
Sets how close you need to get to consider the destination reached.
Smaller values require more precision.
topdown_view.config.sprint_distance_thre: Automatically sprint when the destination is at least this far away.
topdown_view.config.auto_align_to_moveme: Automatically rotate camera to movement direction after moving steadily in the same direction.
topdown_view.config.auto_align_angle_thr: Auto-rotation starts when the angle between camera and movement direction exceeds this value.
topdown_view.config.auto_align_cooldown_: Cooldown after auto-rotation before next rotation can occur (20 ticks = 1 second).
topdown_view.config.stable_direction_ang: Angle tolerance to consider movement direction as stable. Lower values require more precision.
topdown_view.config.stable_direction_tic: Time required to maintain stable direction before auto-rotation triggers.
topdown_view.config.auto_align_animation: How quickly the camera rotates. Lower = slower, higher = faster.
topdown_view.config.cylinder_radius_hori: Sets the horizontal culling range from the camera.
topdown_view.config.cylinder_radius_vert: Sets the vertical culling range from the camera.
topdown_view.config.cylinder_forward_shi: Shifts the culling center forward relative to the camera.
topdown_view.config.click_to_move.toolti: Toggles right-click to move and auto-attack functionality.
topdown_view.config.destination_highligh: Display a visual effect at the destination when clicking to move.
topdown_view.config.arrival_threshold.to:
Sets how close you need to get to consider the destination reached.
Smaller values require more precision.
topdown_view.config.attack_range.tooltip: Sets the distance at which automatic attacks trigger when chasing an enemy.
topdown_view.config.fade_enabled.tooltip: Toggles visual fading for blocks at the culling boundary.
topdown_view.config.fade_start.tooltip:
Sets where the fade begins relative to the culling boundary.
0.0 starts near the camera, 0.9 starts close to the edge.
topdown_view.config.fade_near_alpha.tool:
Minimum transparency for culled blocks.
0.0 makes them fully transparent, 1.0 makes them fully opaque.
topdown_view.config.rotate_angle_mode.to:
Sets the snap interval for horizontal camera rotation.
- 90°: Axis-aligned only
- 45°: Isometric diagonal view support
- 15°: Freer rotation
topdown_view.config.camera_pitch.tooltip:
Sets the vertical looking angle of the camera.
90.0 is top-down (bird's eye), 45.0 is an angled view.
Maximum camera distance for zooming out.
Higher values let you see further away.
topdown_view.config.default_camera_dista:
Initial camera distance when enabling top-down view.
Must be between minimum and maximum distance.
Enable mining mode functionality. When disabled, the mining mode key will not respond.
topdown_view.config.mining_mode_pitch.to:
Sets the camera vertical angle during mining mode.
90.0 is top-down, lower values give an angled view.
topdown_view.config.mining_cylinder_radi: Cylinder radius for mining mode culling.
topdown_view.config.mining_cylinder_forw: Shifts the mining mode cylinder center forward (in blocks).
topdown_view.config.drag_rotation_enable: Enable camera rotation by mouse dragging.
topdown_view.config.drag_rotation_sensit: Adjust the sensitivity of drag-based camera rotation.
topdown_view.config.range_indicator_enab: Highlight targets outside attack range in red.
topdown_view.config.range_sword.tooltip: Set attack range when wielding a sword.
topdown_view.config.range_axe.tooltip: Set attack range when wielding an axe.
topdown_view.config.range_pickaxe.toolti: Set attack range when wielding a pickaxe.
topdown_view.config.range_shovel.tooltip: Set attack range when wielding a shovel.
topdown_view.config.range_other.tooltip: Set attack range for other items.
topdown_view.config.force_auto_jump.tool: Automatically climb blocks during click movement only.
topdown_view.config.fade_block_hit_thres:
Only blocks with alpha above this value are hittable.
0.0 = All blocks hittable (off), 1.0 = Only fully opaque blocks
topdown_view.config.camera_y_follow_dela: Enable delayed camera Y-axis follow. Reduces motion sickness during jumps.
Camera Y-axis follow delay in seconds. Higher values make the camera lag more when jumping.
topdown_view.config.camera_x_follow_dela: Enable delayed camera X-axis follow. Reduces motion sickness during movement.
Camera X-axis follow delay in seconds. Higher values make the camera lag more when moving.
topdown_view.config.camera_z_follow_dela: Enable delayed camera Z-axis follow. Reduces motion sickness during movement.
Camera Z-axis follow delay in seconds. Higher values make the camera lag more when moving.
topdown_view.config.reset.tooltip: Reset all settings to default values.
